title: SkillFrontmatter
description: Canonical YAML frontmatter contract for every SKILL.md under .agents/skills/{core,stack}/. Validated by the skills index generator and the skills validator.

name.description: Skill identifier. MUST equal the parent directory name of the SKILL.md file.

description.description: One-paragraph human description of when to use this skill.

allowed_tools.description: Optional tool allowlist that scopes the skill's execution surface.

vendor.description: Optional vendor / library / product tag for stack skills (e.g. 'playwright', 'tailwind').
